reviews.review_description: It’s overall a good game but the crowbars glitch through stuff and a lot of stages are very hard (which I like) but I think it needs more checkpoints (especially toy playground) but overall good game if you like a challenge I’d recommend getting it. Edit: I’d recommend turbo mode for new players

BRO every time I play this game, I always get stuck on random things like handlebars I should’ve leaving this a zero star review everyone is reading this. I would not recommend buying it. It took me 30 minutes just to do the easy level of a YouTuber make it so easy like Whf this game is 
Edit I tested it out and you fix the problem I can finally move around freely instead of gain stuck into bars like a glue thank you for fixing this bug. I really appreciate it.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ninjamum1,

Thank you so much for the feedback and revised review! Feedback like yours helps me improve the game and I'm happy that the update helped make the game fun for you! I'll continue to make adjustments and changes to make the game fun, challenging, and fair to as many people as possible.

reviews.review_description: So expensive for a game that is not thought through you get stuck on random thing and there are a bunch of levels that are extreme and pretty long. You don’t get any checkpoints when you fall off the map when you’re 20 minutes to the level you have to start back at the very beginning and you can’t even get a refund. You pay seven dollars for a good quality game but not through game and you’ll end up hating it and not be able to do anything about it because you spent seven dollars and can’t have any refunds.

developer_response.body:
Hi TGB,

Thanks for the feedback and I'm sorry to hear you aren't enjoying my game. 

I thought having a lot of maps that are extreme and long would be a good thing >>! There is usually at least 1 checkpoint in every stage around halfway through (although shorter ones like Twilight Gravity have 0), so just keep going until you reach one! 

Refunds are handled by Meta and not me, usually you can refund within 14 days if you've played less than 2 hours, so reach out to Meta for that next time! 

Thanks again for the feedback, I will keep it in mind!

reviews.review_description:
It’s decently fun until you fall a hundred times. I know you’re supposed to be challenged, but for 7 dollars, I wouldn’t buy. It’s worth it if the price was reduced. There are just way more complex and thought out free games. Buy if you want to. Not great, but not bad. And if you have motion sickness, be careful.

Edit: I do enjoy it a little more now and the dev is cool with responding. That’s not why I’m changing it up a star, but I do a little better.

This game isn’t all that bad but when I started the game was actually fair now I couldn’t even go to the base level after joining one but what makes it unfair is the fact that if you don’t play the game 24/7 it’s impossible to beat! Over all though it isn’t that bad just could use a little bit of”fixing”

I bought this game last year and it is so fun! It kinda exercises your arms! And it's a very challenging fun game! I recommend buying this!

This game tries to disguise poor development and crappy craftsmanship as a rage game. With overpriced cosmetics, zero story, and the fact that it just looks terrible, it's not fun to play. It has janky movement and terrible bugs with￼ few different maps which ended up being ￼basically the same thing with slightly mixed around obstacles and very little decoration. Overall do not buy not worth your time or money.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback, I'm sorry you aren't enjoying my game. 

There is indeed no story (intended) as this is just a fun climbing simulator game. I've added a lot of different variations and tricks to maps to keep them all feeling different (low gravity, different falling obstacles, boosts and tornadoes, etc...); I hope you tried them all! 

I'll take this feedback into account when planning future updates.

reviews.review_title: Don't Buy, It's Not as Fun as it Seems
reviews.review_description: After a few days of grinding, I was able to get the top 500 aura (super easy). But my best is 56s, and every attempt after had me frustrated. The physics are garbage, even with the new mode. And the game is VERY low quality for what you're paying for. Not fun, just a rage game, and it's best to refund if you do buy it.

They are just trying to get money off yall and make TikTok vids saying should i make it free and half of the people in the game said he got tired of him saying to make it free not only hes trying to get clout he is also trying to annoy you guys tho the point were you buy the game

The game is very boring I expected it to atleast have music or something. There isn’t may stuff to do, the game is very expensive and the owner of the game is horrible , I only played the game once and it was ahh horrible waste of money

developer_response.body:
Hi Goat,

Sorry to hear you think I'm horrible (not sure what I specifically did to you). The game does have its own music (every stage!), try turning your volume up! It's a game about climbing and there are tons of stages to do so on, so if you were expecting something different I'm sorry.

developer_response.body:
Hi Cool.Kid, 

I'm sorry to hear you didn't enjoy my game. Have you tried climbing with Turbo mode?
Also, if you've only spent less than 1 minute playing my game then you can't expect to be better than people getting world records! If you ever feel a change of heart I suggest trying again with turbo mode and sticking with it a bit longer!

reviews.review_description: It’s a pretty fun game, and most of the reviews you see saying that it sucks are probably just from kids that played it for a bit and rage quit. It’s supposed to be hard, so you shouldn’t have gotten it if you didn’t expect any anger. Trust me if you have it you will get better and it gets so much more fun and satisfying to play
This game is really fun and it’s strategic. I would definitely recommend playing this. You can even challenge yourself by beating your own time.

developer_response.body:
Hi Billybob, 

I'm sorry to hear you aren't enjoying my game. Which levels do you feel are lookalikes? I've made sure to add a new feature or gimmick to every stage and change the design and theme, so if you have any specific feedback I'd love to hear it.

Game is crazy hard. Crowbars get stuck behind you. Very few reset points. The instructions are terrible! They walk you through like 5 percent of what you'll find. Leaving you to figure out the rest! I would not recommend. The game wants you to fail! I swear its almost like a joke game to make you think you can climb the hill but in reality it's impossible!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest feedback. I agree that crowbars getting stuck on pipes or other spots is definitely more frustrating than challenging, that’s my bad. I just released a new update that fixes collision detection on several objects and replaces snag-prone pipes with flat surfaces across 4 of the most popular stages, Toy Planet, Divine Dungeon, Cosmic Ascent, and Sky Blue Mountain. 

The update also added more checkpoints to the Toy Planet and Divine dungeon stages! I’ve also made some adjustments to the tutorial as well. 

I’m working on some larger changes and improvements for a future release, so please keep an eye out for them! I hope you enjoy the new Crowbar Climber experience I’m working on!
